title: lotus argophyllus subsp. ornithopus
intro: Lotus argophyllus subsp. ornithopus, also known as the water lily or ornithopus lotus, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of lotus argophyllus subsp. ornithopus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, and can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves.
